title: Rupin tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rupin trees''' were [[Tree/Legends|trees]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Aruza/Legends|Aruza]]. They had a sickly sweet smell.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Payback: The Tale of Dengar|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
